insight: Hit Cooldown (Settings menu > Custom Settings) is stored as Custom_Settings.Hit_Cooldown in the boss YAML, measured in ticks (default 20 = 1 second, menu range 0-100); in the menu, left click lowers by 1 and right click raises by 1. It sets the entity's maximum no-damage ticks on spawn, so already-spawned bosses keep their old value until they respawn or the boss is re-saved.

On Boss versions before the issue #1552 fix, Custom Settings menu values appear frozen (e.g. clicking Hit Cooldown does nothing) whenever any other boss spawns while the menu is open, because each spawn re-pointed the shared setting state and the menu then read and displayed the wrong boss's values; boolean toggles could even save inverted values. Pre-fix workaround: stop the server and edit Custom_Settings in the boss YAML directly.
